subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire of the love of God! The celestial songbird hath raised its voice in praise of thee and poured forth its melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بنار محبه الله حضرت عندلیب لسان بستایش آنجناب گشود و داد سخن بداد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @love of God
